prompt: create a game interface mockup of a scene where in the middle there's a fishing rod and its already hook up a salmon and user must tap the lower left button to pull the rod
prompt_refined: Generate a game interface screen depicting a fishing scenario. In the center of the screen, a fishing rod is prominently displayed with a large salmon clearly hooked and struggling on its line. In the lower-left corner of the interface, a distinct, interactive button is present, clearly labeled 'Pull Rod', indicating it should be tapped to reel in the fish.
objects: fishing rod (prominently displayed, in the center)
